chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 32 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 02.02.2026 Mr. Ameer Ali Rind, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On behalf of the applicants, written undertaking is filed in this bail application, wherein the applicants are accused of Crime No.168 of 2025, registered at Police Station Sorah, District Khairpur, under Sections 353, 186, 506/2, 148, 149, PPC, primarily alleging that the present applicants were resisted with the law enforcement by the complainant, which was made in compliance of the orders of this Court requiring that no crushing plant be operated in the area. Learned DPG, however, opposes the bail application on the ground that the violation of the Court’s orders has been indulged into by the applicants who were not restricting themselves, and on the other hand, required the officials not to obstruct their working; as such, the FIR has been lodged. Having heard the learned Counsels and gone through the record, apparently considering the sections which were imposed against the applicants as well as the present undertaking violation of which shall tantamount to withdrawal of the concession of the bail, let the applicants be released on bail against a surety of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. The bail application stands allowed in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
